CustomField.formula: IF(TEXT( leaseworks__Customer_Requirements__c ) = 'Have little or no idea',0, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Customer_Requirements__c ) = 'Have some understanding based on limited resources',25, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Customer_Requirements__c ) = 'Have a good understanding based on reliable sources',50, IF(TEXT(leaseworks__Customer_Requirements__c ) = 'Thoroughly understand, documented, and validated',100,null))))
CustomField.label: _Customer_Requirements
